events.content: Flush cloud-login callback responses before signaling result: Flush cloud-login callback responses before signaling result

raw.question: Flush cloud-login callback responses before signaling result
raw.chosen: Flush cloud-login callback responses before signaling result
raw.reasoning: The handler could send errCh/tokenCh before net/http flushed the response; runCloudLogin then returned and closed the server, making clients intermittently see EOF.
